title: streptanthus flavescens
intro: Streptanthus flavescens, also known as California jewelflower, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Streptanthus flavescens can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
